flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Quincy University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.2k → $37.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Quincy University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.2k → $37.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Quincy University rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.2k → $24.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Quincy University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (42.7% vs 49.3%).
